problem: Customers cannot sign in after the auth service deployment; login returns HTTP 500 and token validation errors.
expected_memory_signal: auth/login JWT issuer or secret configuration incidents should be retrieved when present.

problem: Checkout latency spiked after a database migration and requests are timing out during payment confirmation.
expected_memory_signal: checkout/database migration validation incidents should be retrieved when present.

problem: Invoice batch processing stopped overnight after a scheduler configuration change.
expected_memory_signal: batch scheduler configuration incidents should be retrieved when present.

problem: Payment provider callbacks started failing signature checks after a webhook secret rotation.
expected_memory_signal: webhook secret rotation incidents should be retrieved when present.

problem: Customers are locked out of their accounts right after the identity platform rollout; every sign-in attempt bounces.
expected_memory_signal: paraphrase of auth/login deployment incidents; semantic retrieval should surface them even with low token overlap.

problem: Purchases hang at the payment step ever since the schema change shipped; shoppers see spinners and abandoned carts.
expected_memory_signal: paraphrase of checkout/database migration incidents; semantic retrieval should surface them even with low token overlap.

problem: No billing documents were produced last night; the recurring back-office run appears to have silently stopped.
expected_memory_signal: paraphrase of invoice batch scheduler incidents; semantic retrieval should surface them even with low token overlap.
